personal_info.name: Abhilash R
personal_info.profile_summary: Web Developer skilled in building full-stack websites from scratch using MERN stack and modern web technologies. Passionate about crafting innovative user experiences and solving real-world problems through responsive and scalable web applications.

projects.title: Movie App
projects.description: Built a fully functional movie browsing platform from scratch. Implemented searching, filtering, and CRUD operations with MongoDB. Designed user-friendly UI with React and ensured smooth experience.

projects.title: Online Bidding System
projects.description: Created a dynamic platform supporting real-time bidding and user roles. Integrated backend APIs using Express.js with secure data handling. Focused on usability and innovative bidding interactions.

strengths: Creative thinker with strong innovation mindset
Fast learner with excellent problem-solving skills
